title: CB22 3FG, Immaterial Ltd: environmental permit issued – EPR/DP3721SD/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Immaterial Ltd Installation name: Sawston Pilot Scale Production Facility Permit number: EPR/DP3721SD  "
